请说明本次改动内容及原因。

- Related to #

- [ ] New feature

- [ ] `go build ./...`

List key commands or checks you ran:

# paste commands here

## Notes for Reviewers / 给评审者的说明

Call out any tradeoffs, follow-up work, or review focus areas.

## Checklist / 提交检查

- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I sanitized logs, payloads, and examples.
- [ ] I kept the pull request focused and reviewable.
